title: Corporate finance
summary: Concepts, formulas, and calculators for studying bonds, shares, leverage, financial ratios, and leasing.

modules.title: Bonds
modules.summary: Understand the present value of bond cash flows and how required return changes the price.

modules.title: Shares
modules.summary: Value shares with zero, constant, variable, and preferred growth from a single workflow.

modules.title: Leverage
modules.summary: Measure how operating and financial profit react to changes in sales and cost structure.

modules.title: Financial ratios
modules.summary: Analyze liquidity, activity, debt, and profitability from a single structured input set.

modules.title: Finance lease
modules.summary: Review the logic of leasing as a financing source and its economic impact.
